template_data.quote_html: Pick the vehicle that matches where you are, not where you want to be.
template_data.image_headline: WRONG VEHICLE. WRONG TIMING. REAL PROBLEM.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic quote-card layout. Cream background. Top: bold dark navy ALL CAPS headline 'WRONG VEHICLE. WRONG TIMING.' with a small caution icon. Center: illustrated professional man in business casual standing at a four-way signpost — each arm labeled with a short 2-word vehicle name: 'GSA MAS', 'SEWP V', 'OASIS+', 'CIO-SP4'. Character looks analytical, not confused — pen in hand, reviewing a clipboard. Bottom: dark navy banner with short pull quote 4-5 words: 'MATCH WHERE YOU ARE'. Clean, minimal, modern. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
